# QuarterSmart

> QuarterSmart builds AI onboarding, training, and automation systems for growing teams. We turn each SOP into three things from one source: a training course your team learns from (AI-generated video, quizzes, certification), an automation that runs the task itself (n8n, Zapier, Power Automate), and an AOP, a procedure your AI agent can run. Same source, three outputs: train, automate, operate. Tagline: Train your team. Automate the rest.

QuarterSmart is based in Mesa, Arizona and works with clients across the United States. Founders: Hyrum Hurst builds the systems; Cullen Brown manages engagements. Hyrum Hurst is a Google Certified AI Automations Engineer and a verified top-50 n8n creator with templates used more than 10,000 times.

We serve growing businesses, franchises, operations and HR and L and D heavy teams, high-turnover teams, nonprofits, and education organizations. We also work as a white-label AI implementation partner for agencies and consultancies: they own the client and sell, we build, document, and hand off.

Offer ladder: 1) AI enablement and training, 2) SOPs to a training system with courses, quizzes, certification, and an owner dashboard, 3) SOPs to automations, 4) recurring coaching and consulting calls, 5) hosting and maintenance Care Plan.

Flagship proof: For Structure Properties, QuarterSmart built a 39-course AI video training and onboarding library across seven roles with Claude-powered quizzes and an owner reporting dashboard. Onboarding time and repeat questions dropped 65 percent and SOP-related mistakes dropped 36 percent.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://quartersmart.com/): Train your team, automate the rest. The SOP triple-duty mechanic.
- [Services](https://quartersmart.com/services): The five-step offer ladder, from training to automation to ongoing care.
- [Case Studies](https://quartersmart.com/case-studies): Structure Properties, Learning Journey AI, Skytech, and the n8n template library.
- [About](https://quartersmart.com/about): Who QuarterSmart is, founders, and credentials.
- [For Agencies](https://quartersmart.com/for-agencies): White-label AI implementation partner for agencies and consultancies.
- [FAQ](https://quartersmart.com/faq): Plain answers about how QuarterSmart works.
- [Contact](https://quartersmart.com/contact): Book a call or request a proposal.
- [Signals](https://quartersmart.com/signals): QuarterSmart's AI insight hub. Operator-focused reads on the models, tools, and shifts that change how teams adopt and run AI.
- [Own Your AI](https://quartersmart.com/own-your-ai): Early access, in active development. A direction QuarterSmart is building toward: a private local AI system a company finances and owns to handle the routine majority of its AI work (roughly 80 percent), still calling a frontier model for the hard minority. An offset, not a replacement, the way solar offsets a power bill. Not a live product yet. Waitlist open.

## People
- Hyrum Hurst: Founder of QuarterSmart, AI systems and automation specialist based in Mesa, Arizona. Verified top-50 n8n creator with 25 published workflow templates used more than 10,000 times across the n8n community. Google Certified AI Automations Engineer.
- Cullen Brown: Operator and outreach manager at QuarterSmart, manages engagements from first conversation to live rollout.

## n8n Templates (full list)
QuarterSmart founder Hyrum Hurst has published 25 workflow templates on the n8n template marketplace, with 10,876 documented uses total as of June 2026. Each template has its own page and public use counter. Browse and open every template at the creator profile: https://n8n.io/creators/hyrum-hurst

Templates with cumulative uses:
1. Automate YouTube Shorts creation from Telegram prompts using Gemini and VEO (5,078)
2. Capture and schedule HVAC leads with OpenAI, Google Sheets, Slack and SMS (1,723)
3. Create consulting client onboarding tasks with GPT-4, Google Sheets and Slack (1,085)
4. Create a one-minute video from Telegram prompts with Veo 3 and Fal.ai (941)
5. Analyze legal contracts with GPT-4.1 and manage cases in Google Sheets and Slack (541)
6. Analyze website SEO and log AI recommendations to Google Sheets with OpenAI (339)
7. Send Stripe invoice reminders with GPT-4.1-mini, Google Sheets and Slack (290)
8. Capture and nurture AI agency leads with Google Gemini, Outlook and Sheets (117)
9. Nurture landscaping leads and book calls with GoHighLevel, OpenAI and Slack (96)
10. Extract data from PDF reports with Gmail, OCR, Google Sheets and OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini (95)
11. Automate property inspections and reporting with OpenAI, Google Sheets and Slack (86)
12. Send package and visitor alerts with Slack, SMS, email, Google Sheets and Claude (62)
13. Send Stripe expired charge recovery reminders with OpenAI (60)
14. Send AI pet grooming reminders and follow-ups with GPT-4o mini, Twilio, email, Google Sheets and Slack (53)
15. Generate AI SOPs from Google Drive with GPT-4o, Google Docs and Sheets (52)
16. Generate proposals with GPT-4o, Google Docs, Gmail and Slack (50)
17. Coordinate move-out cleaning and repair tasks with Sheets, Slack, email and Claude (44)
18. Triage tenant complaints with GPT-4.1, Slack, email and Google Sheets (43)
19. Generate consulting KPI summaries with GPT-4o-mini, Slack and Google Sheets (27)
20. Send AI-prioritized follow-up reminders with GPT-4.1-mini, Gmail and Slack (18)
21. Qualify and route consulting leads with GPT-4.1-mini, Slack and Google Sheets (17)
22. Track tenant document compliance with GPT-4, Drive, Sheets, email and Slack (17)
23. Scrape verified decision-maker emails from Google with GPT-4.1 and Apify (15)
24. Escalate unresolved maintenance requests with GPT-4o, Google Sheets and Slack (14)
25. Generate DraftKings DFS lineups with GPT-4o, Google Sheets, email and Slack (13)
Total: 10,876 documented uses across 25 templates.

## Contact
Book a call or request a proposal at https://quartersmart.com/contact. Email hyrum@quartersmart.com.
